name: Morgan Eventloop
title: Serverless Advocate · Community Speaker
tagline: Collects event-driven architecture diagrams and excellent coffee.
factoids: Once gave a lightning talk using only a queue of sticky notes.
Maintains an open-source collection of event-driven patterns.
jokes: My function has commitment issues: it only runs when invoked.
I asked the event bus for directions. It sent my question everywhere.

interaction.greeting: Want to trade a serverless pattern for a conference survival tip?
dialogue: Events are easy; knowing which ones matter is the real design work.
